title: Shell & Apply-Patch Tool Execution
interaction_flow: RunLoop → tool_execution: execute_shell_calls(public_agent, calls: list[ToolRunShellCall], context_wrapper, hooks, config)
tool_execution → ShellAction: execute(agent, call, hooks, context_wrapper, config) [serial, one call at a time]
ShellAction → coerce_shell_call(call.tool_call) → ShellCommandData
ShellAction → evaluate_needs_approval_setting(shell_tool.needs_approval, context_wrapper, shell_call.action, call_id)
ShellAction → [if needs_approval] resolve_approval_status(tool_name, call_id, raw_item, agent, context_wrapper, on_approval)
ShellAction → [if rejected] shell_rejection_item(agent, call_id) → return ToolCallOutputItem
ShellAction → [if pending] return approval_item (interruption)
ShellAction → hooks.on_tool_start(context_wrapper, agent, shell_tool) + agent_hooks.on_tool_start [parallel gather]
ShellAction → shell_tool.executor(ShellCommandRequest) → ShellResult | str
ShellAction → [ShellResult] normalize_shell_output entries → truncate_shell_outputs → render_shell_outputs → output_text
ShellAction → hooks.on_tool_end(context_wrapper, agent, shell_tool, output_text) + agent_hooks.on_tool_end [parallel gather]
ShellAction → return ToolCallOutputItem(raw_item={type: shell_call_output, call_id, output, status})
RunLoop → tool_execution: execute_local_shell_calls(public_agent, calls: list[ToolRunLocalShellCall], ...)
tool_execution → LocalShellAction: execute(agent, call, hooks, context_wrapper, config) [serial]
LocalShellAction → hooks.on_tool_start [parallel gather]
LocalShellAction → call.local_shell_tool.executor(LocalShellCommandRequest) → result (sync or async)
LocalShellAction → hooks.on_tool_end [parallel gather]
LocalShellAction → return ToolCallOutputItem(raw_item={type: local_shell_call_output, call_id, output})
RunLoop → tool_execution: execute_apply_patch_calls(public_agent, calls: list[ToolRunApplyPatchCall], ...)
tool_execution → ApplyPatchAction: execute(agent, call, hooks, context_wrapper, config) [serial]
ApplyPatchAction → coerce_apply_patch_operations(call.tool_call, context_wrapper) → list[ApplyPatchOperation]
ApplyPatchAction → extract_apply_patch_call_id(call.tool_call) → call_id
ApplyPatchAction → [per operation] evaluate_needs_approval_setting(apply_patch_tool.needs_approval, ...) → bool
ApplyPatchAction → [if any needs_approval] resolve_approval_status(...) → approval_status
ApplyPatchAction → [if rejected] apply_patch_rejection_item(agent, call_id, type=apply_patch_call_output) → return
ApplyPatchAction → hooks.on_tool_start(context_wrapper, agent, apply_patch_tool) [parallel gather]
ApplyPatchAction → [per operation type] editor.create_file(op) | editor.update_file(op) | editor.delete_file(op)
ApplyPatchAction → normalize_apply_patch_result(awaited) → ApplyPatchResult (status, output)
ApplyPatchAction → hooks.on_tool_end(context_wrapper, agent, apply_patch_tool, output_text) [parallel gather]
ApplyPatchAction → return ToolCallOutputItem(raw_item={type: apply_patch_call_output, call_id, status, output})
--- Sandbox Shell Path (ExecCommandTool via Shell Capability) ---
Shell(Capability).tools() → ShellToolSet(ExecCommandTool(session, user), WriteStdinTool(session) if pty)
ExecCommandTool._invoke(ctx, raw_input) → args_model.model_validate_json(raw_input) → run(ExecCommandArgs)
ExecCommandTool.run → _resolve_workdir_command(session, cmd, workdir) → wrapped_command
ExecCommandTool.run → _resolve_shell(args.shell, args.login) → shell spec
ExecCommandTool.run → [if session.supports_pty()] session.pty_exec_start(cmd, shell, tty, user, yield_time_s, max_output_tokens)
ExecCommandTool.run → [PTY ExecTransportError fallback] _run_one_shot_exec(session, command, timeout_s, shell, max_output_tokens, user)
ExecCommandTool.run → [no PTY] _run_one_shot_exec(session, command, timeout_s, shell, max_output_tokens, user)
_run_one_shot_exec → session.exec(command, timeout, shell, user) → ExecResult(stdout, stderr, exit_code)
_run_one_shot_exec → _normalize_output(stdout, stderr) → _truncate_output(output, max_output_tokens)
ExecCommandTool.run → _format_response(output, wall_time, exit_code, process_id, original_token_count) → str
WriteStdinTool._invoke → run(WriteStdinArgs) → session.pty_write_stdin(session_id, chars, yield_time_s, max_output_tokens) → _format_response
key_relationships: ShellAction uses ShellTool (executor: ShellExecutor | None, needs_approval, on_approval)
LocalShellAction uses LocalShellTool (executor: LocalShellExecutor, no approval)
ApplyPatchAction uses ApplyPatchTool (editor: Editor, needs_approval, on_approval)
Shell(Capability) composes ShellToolSet(ExecCommandTool, WriteStdinTool) from BaseSandboxSession
WriteStdinTool extends FunctionTool; tool_name=write_stdin; requires pty support
All action classes fire RunHooks + AgentHooks on_tool_start/on_tool_end in parallel (asyncio.gather)
All action classes return ToolCallOutputItem as RunItem

approval_flow.shell: evaluate_needs_approval_setting → resolve_approval_status → approval_status: True|False|None(pending) → rejection or interruption item
approval_flow.apply_patch: per-operation loop checking needs_approval; first truthy breaks and triggers approval flow
approval_flow.local_shell: no approval plumbing — executor is called directly

data_models.ExecCommandArgs: cmd, workdir, shell, login(bool), tty(bool), yield_time_ms(default 10000), max_output_tokens
data_models.ShellResult: output: list[ShellOutput], max_output_length: int|None, provider_data: dict|None

error_handling: ExecCommandTool: ExecTimeoutError/TimeoutError → output = 'Command timed out after N seconds'
ExecCommandTool: ExecTransportError (retry_safe) → fallback to _run_one_shot_exec with fallback_notice
ShellAction: executor exception → status='failed', format_shell_error(exc), span.set_error
ApplyPatchAction: editor exception → status='failed', format_shell_error(exc), span.set_error
ShellTool hosted env: needs_approval/on_approval must be False/None; executor must be None
important_notes: Shell calls (sandbox) use ExecCommandTool via Shell(Capability) bound to BaseSandboxSession; supports PTY (interactive) and one-shot modes with fallback. Local shell calls use LocalShellTool.executor directly (no sandbox). ApplyPatchTool.editor dispatches file operations (create/update/delete). All three action types run serially per batch. Tracing includes sensitive data only if config.trace_include_sensitive_data=True.
